questions.question: By the time I arrived, she ___ already left.
He hadn't ___ snow before he moved to Canada.
They ___ finished dinner before the guests arrived.
I realized I ___ forgotten my wallet.
She told me she ___ visited that country before.
We ___ just sat down when the phone rang.
Had you ___ the book before the exam?
By 2005, he ___ worked there for 20 years.
She hadn't ___ such a beautiful sunset before.
After they ___ eaten, they went for a walk.
By the time we got to the cinema, the film ___ already started.
She said she ___ read the book before watching the film.
I'd never ___ sushi before that dinner.
After he'd ___ lunch, he went back to work.
We ___ already paid the bill when the waiter came back.
___ you ever seen snow before you moved to Finland?
She was exhausted because she ___ worked all night.
He couldn't find his keys because he ___ left them at the office.
By the time I got home, my children ___ gone to bed.
I hadn't ___ English before I moved to London.
They were late because they ___ missed the train.
Before she became a teacher, she ___ worked as an actress.
Had he ___ the contract before he signed it?
I felt sick because I ___ eaten too much.
She hadn't ___ anyone at the party before that night.
He'd never ___ such beautiful music before that concert.
After she'd ___ university, she travelled the world.
We'd just ___ when it started to rain heavily.
Had they ___ the meeting before we got there?
I realized I'd ___ a terrible mistake.
She was crying because she ___ lost her purse.
Before the accident, he ___ never broken a bone.
___ she spoken to the manager before she resigned?
By 2010, they ___ already built three new schools.
I'd ___ her name by the time I saw her again.
After the guests ___ left, we cleaned the whole house.
He was surprised because no one ___ told him the news.
I hadn't ___ the film, so I didn't know the ending.
By the time she was 30, she ___ lived in five different countries.
The house was empty. Everyone ___ already gone home.
